title: Run
description: A structured record of one goal execution attempt

run_id.description: Unique identifier, typically NNN-slug matching the goal file

goal_file.description: Path to the goal file, relative to repo root

status.description: Canonical run status: running is the only non-terminal value; terminal values are success, failure, killed, and abandoned. Legacy readers may still normalize older completed/failed values during migration, but newly written records must use only the canonical vocabulary.

driver.description: Resolved execution driver used for the run

model.description: Resolved model used for the run

agent.description: Legacy alias for the resolved model identifier used for the run

cost.description: Canonical run cost object. New terminal records should write token totals plus actual_usd and/or estimated_usd with pricing provenance when locally estimated; legacy records may omit newer fields.

outputs.description: Files produced by this run, relative to run directory

num_turns.description: Number of agent turns in the run

notes.description: Free-form notes from the agent about this run
